PWAInstallation.title: Installation Guide
PWAInstallation.description: Follow these steps to install the app on your device
PWAInstallation.offlineAccessDescription: Use the app even when you're not connected to the internet
PWAInstallation.fasterLoadingDescription: App loads instantly with cached resources
PWAInstallation.nativeExperienceDescription: Feels like a native app with full-screen experience
PWAInstallation.notificationsDescription: Get notified about important updates and events
PWAInstallation.iosStep1Description: Look for the share icon in your browser's toolbar
PWAInstallation.iosStep2Description: Scroll down and tap 'Add to Home Screen'
PWAInstallation.iosStep3Description: Tap 'Add' to install the app on your home screen
PWAInstallation.androidChromeStep1Description: You should see an 'Install' button in your browser
PWAInstallation.androidChromeStep2Description: Tap the 'Install' button to add the app to your home screen
PWAInstallation.androidOtherStep1Description: Tap the three dots menu in your browser
PWAInstallation.androidOtherStep2Description: Select 'Add to Home Screen' or 'Install App'
PWAInstallation.desktopChromeStep1Description: You should see an install icon in the address bar
PWAInstallation.desktopChromeStep2Description: Click the install button to add the app to your desktop
PWAInstallation.desktopFirefoxStep1Description: Click the three lines menu in your browser
PWAInstallation.desktopFirefoxStep2Description: Select 'Install' to add the app to your desktop
PWAInstallation.desktopSafariStep1Description: Click the share button in your browser's toolbar
PWAInstallation.desktopSafariStep2Description: Select 'Add to Dock' to install the app
PWAInstallation.genericStep1Description: Look for an install option in your browser's menu
PWAInstallation.genericStep2Description: Follow your browser's specific instructions for installing web apps

SyncHandler.title: Data Synchronization
SyncHandler.description: Manage data synchronization between local storage and server
SyncHandler.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete all local data? This cannot be undone.
SyncHandler.syncPartial: Sync completed with {success} successful and {failed} failed
SyncHandler.importPartial: Import completed with {success} successful and {failed} failed
SyncHandler.offlineError: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to sync or import data.
SyncHandler.syncToServerHelp: Uploads your local changes to the server. This will sync all pending local data.
SyncHandler.importFromServerHelp: Downloads all data from the server to your local database. This will replace synced data but preserve pending local changes.
SyncHandler.deleteLocalDBHelp: Permanently deletes all local data. This action cannot be undone. You will need to import data again to use the app.

ScheduleConflict.title: Pending & Conflicting Schedules

epochMismatch.title: Data Sync Conflict
epochMismatch.description: Server data has been reset since your last login. Your local cached data is outdated.
epochMismatch.pendingChanges: You have {count} unsaved local change(s) that will be lost.
epochMismatch.recommendation: We recommend clearing your local cache to sync with the latest server data.
